tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: test_css_description_first_child_spacing and test_pure_content_conditional_title_rendering are purely text-matching tests using regex on file contents (re.search on open(path).read()). They never import, render, or execute the component. While other tests (unit tests, lint) do execute code, the two fail-to-pass tests are entirely text-based assertions.

test_not_tautological.reason: Both f2p tests (test_css_description_first_child_spacing and test_pure_content_conditional_title_rendering) are pure text-matching tests. A stub that simply appends the matching text patterns to the respective files without understanding the bug would pass. For example, adding a comment containing '&:first-child': { marginInlineEnd: token.marginSM } to style/index.ts would pass the first test.
